analogy_prompt: Hot is to cold as day is to ___

Sail is to boat as engine is to ___
Pen is to write as hammer is to ___
Bark is to tree as skin is to ___
Pilot is to airplane as captain is to ___
Flour is to bread as grape is to ___
Telescope is to stars as microscope is to ___
